DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT VIOLA DELAMETER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: February 21, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Plaintiff, Alex Yakovlev, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Delameter James, a/k/a James Delameter, and Viola Scurto.
Defaults entered on December 14, 2007.
Does dismissed today, February 21, 2008.

Exhibit 1---Notice of Right to Reclaim Abondoned Property from Michael Hall
to Alex Yakovlev dated 02/14/08 with attachments------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Alex Yakovlev and against the Defaulted Defendants: Delameter James, a/k/a James Delameter, and Viola Scurto as follows:

Damages/Principal $10,788.78.
for a total of $10,788.78.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
